# Sessions

Chronological session logs for this campaign. Each session gets its own file.

File naming: `Session NNN - Title.md`

## Schema
- type: session
- campaign: wiki-link to campaign
- session_number, date_played (YYYY-MM-DD)
- locations: list of wiki-links
- npcs: list of wiki-links
- tags: freeform list

## Sessions
(none yet)
